name: pick-your-wallpaper
title: Pick Your Wallpaper
subtitle: Wallpaper Management
description: Lets you pick a wallpaper from a folder of finder.
author: hugomarfani

preferences.name: wallpaperFolder
preferences.title: Wallpaper Folder Directory
preferences.description: The directory where your wallpapers are stored

commands.name: choose-wallpaper
commands.title: Choose Wallpaper
commands.description: Pick a wallpaper from a folder of finder.

preferences.name: displaySize
preferences.title: Display Size
preferences.description: Grid size of the wallpaper picker

preferences.name: showTitle
preferences.label: Show Wallpaper Titles
preferences.title: Shows Wallpaper Titles
preferences.description: Shows the wallpaper titles in the picker

commands.name: set-as-wallpaper
commands.title: Set as Wallpaper
commands.description: Set selected picture as a desktop wallpaper.

tools.name: search-wallpapers
tools.title: Search Wallpapers
tools.description: Search the wallpaper collection using a natural language description of colors, mood, subject, or style

tools.name: suggest-wallpaper
tools.title: Suggest Wallpaper
tools.description: Suggest the best wallpaper from the collection based on a mood, activity, or context

tools.name: set-wallpaper
tools.title: Set Wallpaper
tools.description: Set a specific wallpaper as the desktop background on all desktops

ai.instructions:
You manage the user's desktop wallpaper collection. You have direct access to their wallpapers via tools.

MANDATORY WORKFLOW:
- If the user asks to find, search, or browse wallpapers → IMMEDIATELY call search-wallpapers with their description
- If the user asks for a suggestion, recommendation, or mood-based wallpaper → IMMEDIATELY call suggest-wallpaper
- If the user asks to set, apply, or use a wallpaper → IMMEDIATELY call set-wallpaper with the filename

PRESENTING RESULTS:
- After search-wallpapers or suggest-wallpaper returns results, ALWAYS present 3 options as a numbered list
- For each option show: the display name and a one-sentence description of what it looks like
- End with: "Which one would you like to set? Just say the number."
- When the user picks a number or names a wallpaper, IMMEDIATELY call set-wallpaper with that filename

CRITICAL: You MUST call the tools immediately. Do NOT ask clarifying questions first. Do NOT say you don't have access. Do NOT offer hypothetical options. Just call the appropriate tool right away with whatever information the user gave you.
